nasb.text: and began saying to Him, “By what authority are You doing these things, or who gave You this authority to do these things?”

esv.text: and they said to him, “By what authority are you doing these things, or who gave you this authority to do them?”

cnv.text: 問他：“你憑甚麼權柄作這些事？誰給你權柄作這些事？”

ccb.text: “你凭什么权柄做这些事？谁授权给你了？”

csbs.text: 他们问：“你凭什么权柄做这些事？谁给你这权柄，让你做这些事？”
